creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: brd (doc committer)
Date: Fri Mar 28 16:00:26 2014
New Revision: 349434
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/349434
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r349434/

Log:
  - Add databases/puppetdb-terminus
  
  PR:		187938
  Submitted by:	Geoff Garside  < freebsd at geoffgarside.co.uk >
  Reviewed by:	swills@

Added:
  head/databases/puppetdb-terminus/
  head/databases/puppetdb-terminus/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/puppetdb-terminus/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/puppetdb-terminus/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/puppetdb-terminus/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/databases/Makefile

Modified: head/databases/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/Makefile	Fri Mar 28 15:59:41 2014	(r349433)
+++ head/databases/Makefile	Fri Mar 28 16:00:26 2014	(r349434)
@@ -702,6 +702,7 @@
     SUBDIR += proftpd-mod_sql_postgres
     SUBDIR += proftpd-mod_sql_sqlite
     SUBDIR += proftpd-mod_sql_tds
+    SUBDIR += puppetdb-terminus
     SUBDIR += pure-sql3
     SUBDIR += puredb
     SUBDIR += pxlib

Added: head/databases/puppetdb-terminus/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/databases/puppetdb-terminus/Makefile	Fri Mar 28 16:00:26 2014	(r349434)
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	puppetdb-terminus
+PORTVERSION=	1.6.3
+CATEGORIES=	databases ruby
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads.puppetlabs.com/puppetdb/
+DISTNAME=	puppetdb-${PORTVERSION}
+
+MAINTAINER=	freebsd@geoffgarside.co.uk
+COMMENT=	PuppetDB storeconfigs backend terminus module
+
+LICENSE=	APACHE20
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	puppet>=0:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/puppet
+
+USE_RUBY=	yes
+NO_BUILD=	yes
+
+.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
+
+do-install:
+	${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${RUBY_SITELIBDIR}/puppet
+	(cd ${WRKSRC}/ext/master/lib/puppet && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${STAGEDIR}${RUBY_SITELIBDIR}/puppet)
+
+.include <bsd.port.post.mk>

Added: head/databases/puppetdb-terminus/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/databases/puppetdb-terminus/distinfo	Fri Mar 28 16:00:26 2014	(r349434)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (puppetdb-1.6.3.tar.gz) = bfc670f0578b34ed5628a7d467fde245314e53b8d574ce48f1ddd5dc445b5dce
+SIZE (puppetdb-1.6.3.tar.gz) = 21345339

Added: head/databases/puppetdb-terminus/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/databases/puppetdb-terminus/pkg-descr	Fri Mar 28 16:00:26 2014	(r349434)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+The PuppetDB storeconfigs backend terminus module.
+
+WWW: https://docs.puppetlabs.com/puppetdb/latest/

Added: head/databases/puppetdb-terminus/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/databases/puppetdb-terminus/pkg-plist	Fri Mar 28 16:00:26 2014	(r349434)
@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@

+%%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/puppet/util/puppetdb/config.rb
+@dirrmtry %%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/puppet/util/puppetdb
